title: The National Reference Test in 2025
body: "The results digest for the National Reference Test (NRT) in 2025, provided by the National Foundation for Educational Research (NFER), and the annual statement.  Since its introduction in 2017, NFER has been contracted by Ofqual to develop, deliver and analyse the results of the NRT in English and maths.  The NRT is administered annually and shows if student performance in English and maths at GCSE level has changed from year-to-year. This year, more than 13,000 Year 11 students from over 350 schools took part in the NRT. The 2025 NRT testing took place in the spring term, between 21 February and 10 March. "

taxons.title: Key stage 3 and 4 exam marking, qualifications and results
